message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 177 — post-milestone status + direction

RusticMaple: status consolidation after tick 149 + 176 milestones.
Call-graph scan of non-storage subsystems shows orphan-cx holes
are either (a) correct legacy-fallback delegates, (b) by-design
stream lifecycles (SSE), or (c) multi-tick architectural refactors
(TailerSupervisor + RuntimeCore cx plumbing). Recommends
workflows/runner.rs strangler-fig as next target — long deferred
since tick 131, core business logic, clear value, 4-6 tick
breakdown suggested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
